methods.name: load_config
methods.docstring:
Load configuration from file.

        Args:
            file_path: Path to configuration file

        Returns:
            Configuration data

methods.name: save_config
methods.signature: save_config(self, config: Dict[Tuple[str, Any]], file_path: str) -> str
methods.docstring:
Save configuration to file.

        Args:
            config: Configuration data
            file_path: Output file path

        Returns:
            Saved file path

methods.name: convert_config
methods.signature: convert_config(self, input_path: str, output_path: str) -> str
methods.docstring:
Convert configuration between formats.

        Args:
            input_path: Input configuration file
            output_path: Output configuration file

        Returns:
            Output file path

methods.name: merge_configs
methods.signature: merge_configs(self, configs: list, output_path: str) -> str
methods.docstring:
Merge multiple configuration files.

        Args:
            configs: List of configuration file paths
            output_path: Output configuration file

        Returns:
            Output file path

methods.name: validate_config
methods.signature: validate_config(self, config: Dict[Tuple[str, Any]], schema: Dict[Tuple[str, Any]]) -> bool
methods.docstring:
Validate configuration against schema.

        Args:
            config: Configuration to validate
            schema: Validation schema

        Returns:
            True if valid, False otherwise

module_docstring:
Config Utility: Configuration management utilities.

Provides configuration file management, validation, and conversion tools.
